RadioButton.Name: DrawBaseline
RadioButton.Help: Manual Integration: Draw Peak Baseline(s) and integrate

RadioButton.Name: NegatievePeaks
RadioButton.Help: Manual Integration: Draw Baseline for a negative Peak and integrate

RadioButton.Name: TangentSkim
RadioButton.Help: Manual Integration: Tangent skim one Peak and integrate

RadioButton.Name: SplitPeaks
RadioButton.Help: Manual Integration: Split manually integrated Peaks

RadioButton.Name: DeletePeaks
RadioButton.Help: Manual Integration: Remove integrated Peak(s) from the Integration Results

PushButton.Name: UndoEvent
PushButton.Help: Manual Integration: Undo last Manual Integration Event from the current chromatogram. Enabled for particular signals only; choose a single signal from 'Signal(s) Displayed' list

PushButton.Name: RemoveEvents
PushButton.Help: Manual Integration: Remove all events of currently shown chromatograms. It does not update a data file; use SAVE button to permanently remove the events from the corresponding data file(s).

PushButton.Name: SaveEvents
PushButton.Help: Manual Integration: Save events of currently shown chromatograms into the corresponding data file(s)
